title: FallingTrees
body: ## 🪓 FallingTrees Break trees faster than ever! FallingTrees is an essential tool for quick progression and now you have it as a datapack! [![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/H2H118OP6T) > ## Overlay & usage. > To enable the built in overlay, run the ```/scoreboard players set #limit fallingtrees_overlay 1``` command. To disable the instant mining, hold your ```sneak``` key down. > ## Get as enchantment > To use this only as an enchant, install the [FallingTrees Enchantment](https://modrinth.com/datapack/fallingtrees-enchant) datapack alongside this one. ## Showcase ![A showcase of the datapack.](https://github.com/Sheepearrrrrrrrrr/Sheepearrrrrrrrrr.github.io/blob/main/about/yippe.gif?raw=true) ## Some Advice - Don't break too many logs or you may experience lag or the breaking of the entire thing stopping due to the command execution limit. ## Uninstallation To uninstall, run `/function sheepearrr:ft/uninstall`.
